---
name: "Ready-to-post captions"
description: "Use when creating or editing Instagram or LinkedIn ready-to-post caption text files. Keeps final captions copy-paste-ready and separate from planning notes."
applyTo: ["**/*.caption.txt", "**/caption.*.txt"]
---

# Caption Files

- Treat this file as the source of truth for the published caption; keep planning, review notes, asset directions, and alt text in the associated Markdown draft.
- Use plain text only: no Markdown headings, links, emphasis markers, or list syntax.
- Keep intentional paragraph breaks and place hashtags at the end.
- Use only claims, names, links, handles, and calls to action supported by the associated draft and research brief.
- When both platforms are in scope, adapt each caption to its platform instead of changing only the hashtags.
